file_summary: This README.md file documents a React + TypeScript + Vite project template. It provides an overview of the setup, mentions available Vite plugins for React (using Babel or SWC), and includes a section with recommendations for expanding the ESLint configuration for production applications, including specific parser options and plugin suggestions.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the entire content of the README.md file. Lines 1-2 introduce the project as a React + TypeScript + Vite template with minimal setup for HMR and ESLint. Lines 3-9 describe two available official Vite plugins for React (one using Babel, another using SWC for Fast Refresh) with embedded links. Lines 10-30 provide a section on expanding ESLint configuration for production, recommending updates to parserOptions (with a code block example on lines 14-22) and suggesting specific TypeScript ESLint plugins and eslint-plugin-react for extending linting rules.
